All Guides

Rent Beach Gear For Multiple Days With Active Oahu

Planning on using beach gear for multiple days on your trip to the island? At Active Oahu we offer affordable rates for multi-day rentals of a variety of beach gear. You can either pick up the gear at our storefront in Kailua and return it when you are done, or we offer free delivery and […]

Planning on using beach gear for multiple days on your trip to the island? At Active Oahu we offer affordable rates for multi-day rentals of a variety of beach gear. You can either pick up the gear at our storefront in Kailua and return it when you are done, or we offer free delivery and pickup to any hotel, resort, or vacation rental on the island to make your experience easy and hassle-free.

What You Can Rent

  • Beach Chairs

  • Beach Umbrellas

  • Coolers

  • Dry Bags

  • Boogie Boards

  • Snorkel Gear

  • Electric Bikes

  • Surf Boards

  • Paddleboards

  • Single Kayaks

  • Tandem Kayaks

  • Three Person Kayaks

Free Delivery

One of the unique services we offer at Active Oahu is free delivery to any hotel, resort, and vacation rental on the island with a minimum booking of $75. Whether you are staying in Waikiki, the North Shore, Ko Olina, or anywhere in between, take the stress out of your vacation and let us bring the fun right to your doorstep!

Pricing Benefits for Multi-Day Rentals

When you rent gear with us at Active Oahu for multiple days, you get a discounted rate. Check out these deals:

  • Rent gear for 3 full days for the price of two days.

  • Rent a tandem kayak for 8 or more days and the cost will be $37/day, over a 60% discount from our normal full day rate.

  • Rent e-bikes for 7 days for just $25/per day, almost 50% off the typical daily rate.

  • Rent SUP’s for 8 or more days for $22/day, a 60% discount from the normal daily rate.

Where to Use the Gear

Wherever you are staying on the island, there are incredible adventures to be had with your beach gear rentals. Here are some of our recommendations:

  • Paddle to Chinaman’s Hat: Take your kayak or paddleboard rentals over to Kualoa Regional Park and paddle out to the offshore island known as Chinaman’s Hat. Once you land on the island you can hike to the top for stunning panoramic views of the Koolau Mountain Range and coastline. Learn more about paddling to Chinaman’s Hat here: Chinamans Hat Kayak Adventure

  • Kayak to the Kaneohe Sandbar: Glide through the crystal clear waters and keep an eye out for Hawaiian green sea turtles as you paddle out to the sandbar where you will have the surreal experience of standing up in the middle of the ocean. This is also a great spot for snorkeling as there are many coral reefs along the way. Learn more about kayaking to the Kaneohe Sandbar here: Kaneohe Sandbar Self Guided Kayak Adventure

  • Paddle to the Mokulua Islands: For those looking for a longer adventure out on the water, Kailua’s Twin Islands are the perfect paddle! Located about an hour’s paddle from Kailua Beach, this thrilling adventure will land you on the Mokulua Islands where you can explore tide pools and even the famous “Queen’s Bath”. Learn more about kayaking to the Mokulua Islands here: Mokulua Islands Self Guided Kayak Adventure

  • Bodyboard at Kalama Beach: Load up all your beach gear and head to Kalama Beach for a day of catching waves and hanging out under the sun! We recommend bringing a cooler with drinks and food, beach chairs and an umbrella, and of course, boogie boards! Learn more about bodyboarding at Kalama Beach here: Kalama Beach Bodyboarding Adventure

  • Snorkel Around the Island: There are tons of great snorkel spots around the island to check out with your multi-day snorkel rentals. We recommend snorkeling at Shark’s Cove or Lanikai Beach for beginners and Electric Beach for more advanced snorkelers! Learn more about the best snorkel spots on Oahu here:

  • E-bike around Kailua Town: Rent e-bikes and experience all the adventures Kailua has to offer while cruising around on two wheels. e-bikes will give you easy access to the most popular spots and you won’t have to battle for parking. Learn more about our e-bike rentals here: E-bike Rentals in Kailua

Make a Booking

Don’t worry about hunting for rental shops or rearranging your schedule to pick up gear, let us deliver it straight to you! At Active Oahu, we are Our booking process is easy, you can book online and view our rental rates by visiting the link below.
